goal: Align the CUDA base image resolver with the hardened CUDA training preflight by requiring a resolved Docker base image to expose both CUDA markers and Python runtime markers before emitting MIB_DOCKER_BASE_IMAGE_WITH_DIGEST. This prevents the generated handoff from exporting an env var that the next preflight would reject. The gate must not claim M6-RC or v0 release GO; release readiness remains NOT_GO until a real trained adapter and no-fake Docker endpoint evidence exist.
head: bb296b4
blocked_scope: Changing generated training, Docker handoff, or preflight command sequences
Pulling Docker images or downloading dependencies as part of the committed phase
Creating or committing model weights or adapter artifacts
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
Weakening real adapter intake, endpoint, M6, bundle, or v0 release evidence acceptance
Changing runtime templates, Dockerfiles, specs, or release acceptance policy
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may update the CUDA base image resolver to require Python runtime markers in addition to CUDA markers, update focused resolver tests, regenerate the current local resolver/readiness artifacts, and update WORKING.md plus this PABCD contract only.
required_evidence: Resolver emits MIB_DOCKER_BASE_IMAGE_WITH_DIGEST only when CUDA markers and Python runtime markers are both present
Resolver rejects digest-pinned CUDA-only images with python_runtime_markers_missing
Current local resolver artifact remains NOT_READY_CUDA_BASE_IMAGE because the default PyTorch CUDA runtime image is not present locally
Current v0 readiness remains NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole release blocker
warnings: M6-RC remains NOT_GO until real CUDA training and no-fake Docker endpoint evidence are collected.
This gate does not pull Docker images, run CUDA training, or create model weights/adapters.

phase_notes.plan: Open a scoped resolver alignment gate so resolver success criteria match the CUDA training preflight's CUDA/Python runtime marker requirement.
phase_notes.audit: Confirmed resolver allowed CUDA-only images while the hardened CUDA training preflight requires CUDA plus Python runtime markers.
phase_notes.build: Updated resolver success criteria to require python_runtime_markers and added focused rejection coverage for digest-pinned CUDA-only images.
phase_notes.check: Regenerated current local resolver artifact as NOT_READY_CUDA_BASE_IMAGE, reran v0 readiness as NOT_GO, and reran m1-smoke successfully.
phase_notes.done: Phase complete as a resolver/runtime-marker alignment gate. The resolver no longer emits an env var that the next preflight would reject.

pabcd.approved_scope: CUDA base image resolver runtime-marker alignment, focused resolver tests, regenerated resolver/readiness artifacts, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product runtime/API/UI/DB/schema/training behavior changes, no Docker pulls, no model artifacts, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
